description_long: This bungalow features a two-story structure with a dark gable roof and a prominent stone chimney. The front facade includes a double garage, a driveway with a parked car, and a small fenced yard with a gazebo and garden landscaping. The main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch and stonework around the doorway, while the windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides. The rear and side yards are mostly open green space, bordered by a white picket fence. The exterior materials appear to be a combination of stone, wood siding, and asphalt shingles. The overall design is suburban and inviting, with clear residential and family-oriented features.
description: A two-story suburban bungalow with a gable roof, double garage, fenced yard, gazebo, and symmetrical windows. The exterior combines stone, wood siding, and asphalt shingles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance with porch, fenced yard, gazebo, and driveway with a car.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the stone chimney, and the open green backyard area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with multiple windows and a large grassy area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, gazebo, and the continuation of the white picket fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
